GLT 1500
### Next Generation Multi-Service SDR Modem
Unmatched performance and flexibility, supporting GEO, MEO, and LEO

products.name: AeroStream BUCs
products.descriptor: Ka-band wideband amplifiers for in-flight connectivity over LEO and GEO

evidence.snippet:
### Gilat Receives $7 Million Order for In-Flight Connectivity Solution
The Aerostream BUCs are designed to enable robust, high-speed In-Flight Connectivity across both LEO and GEO satellites
[Learn More](https://www.gilat.com/pressreleases/gilat-receives-7-million-order-for-in-flight-connectivity-solution/)

products.name: Land Mobility
products.descriptor: Defense-grade SATCOM terminals for land vehicle mobile connectivity

products.name: SSPAs (Defense Grade)
products.descriptor: Solid-state power amplifiers for defense satellite communications

products.name: Sidewinder ESA
products.descriptor: Multi-orbit electronically steered antenna terminal for in-flight connectivity

evidence.snippet:
Sidewinder ESA
### Gilat Receives $39 Million in Orders for Sidewinder ESA Terminals
New orders for Linefit and Retrofit installations underscore rising global demand for Gilat’s advanced Multi Orbit ESA technology
[Learn More](https://www.gilat.com/pressreleases/gilat-receives-39-million-in-orders-for-sidewinder-esa-terminals/)

products.name: ESR2030Ku
products.descriptor: Ku-band electronically steered antenna for in-flight connectivity

evidence.snippet:
### Gilat ESA – A Game Changer for In-Flight Connectivity
Gilat’s Senior Director Doreet Oren highlights how solutions like Sidewinder and ESR2030Ku are already powering seamless, always‑on passenger experiences and reshaping the future of In-Flight Connectivity
[Read more](https://www.gilat.com/gilat-esa-a-game-changer-for-in-flight-connectivity/)

products.name: SkyEdge IV
products.descriptor: Next-generation multi-orbit VSAT network platform supporting GEO, MEO, and LEO

evidence.snippet:
### SkyEdge IV is Evolving Seamlessly into a Virtualized Architecture
Gilat is the only vendor with a next-generation platform – SkyEdge IV – already operational on software-defined satellites
[Read More](https://www.gilat.com/technologies/virtualization/)

products.name: 5G NTN
products.descriptor: 5G Non-Terrestrial Network satellite platform evolving from SkyEdge IV

evidence.snippet:
### 5G NTN Expanding to Space
Gilat is expanding 5G networks to space with a next generation platform designed to comply with 5G NTN standards and provide an evolution path from SkyEdge IV
[Read more](https://www.gilat.com/technologies/5g-ntn/)

products.name: SkyEdge II-C
products.descriptor: VSAT network platform and modem system

unresolved_questions: All 15 prioritized products were located from the products-services page and homepage; however, all individual technology/product detail pages (e.g., /technologies/isr, /technologies/unmanned-terminals, /product/glt-1500, etc.) were skipped during mirroring. Descriptors, readiness signals, and NDAA/Blue UAS claims for each product are based solely on top-level navigation text and press release snippets — no per-product detail pages were fetched.
ESR2030Ku is mentioned only in a homepage blog teaser alongside Sidewinder; no dedicated product page was fetched, so its full spec and form factor are unconfirmed.

The SSPAs (Defense Grade) entry is listed in the Defense Grade Systems nav section; a separate non-defense SSPAs family (Ground Mobility, In-Flight Connectivity, Gateways) also exists but those are not in the prioritized list.
ISR is listed as a product category in the Defense Grade Systems section but no detail page was fetched — scope/sub-products unknown.
